headline: Prologis Growth Plans Blend Logistics Strength With New Data Center Focus
summary: Prologis (NYSE:PLD) reported strong first quarter results, supported by solid leasing activity and capital recycling. The company raised its development outlook for 2026, signaling a larger future project pipeline. Prologis outlined new business initiatives, including plans to expand into data center projects. For investors tracking NYSE:PLD, the company update comes with the stock recently trading around $144.63. The share price sits against a backdrop of a 12.1% return year to date and a...
